limited.cloud: Request sequence is covered; Dart does not parse audio metadata and uses query-provided song/album/artist or sanitized filename fallback.
limited.decrypt: Does not support weapi and xeapi request decryption; response decryption is covered.
limited.song_url_match: Depends on upstream unblockmusic-utils and returns an explicit limitation envelope in Dart.
limited.song_url_v1: Base xeapi and 302 fallback are covered; unblock/source order depends on upstream unblockmusic-utils.
